name: Swiss Cheese & Mushroom Quiche
recipeIngredient: 4 large Eggs (or 2 whole eggs plus 2 egg whites)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Melt the butter in a small pan. Add onions, and sauté over medium heat for a few minutes. When they begin to soften, add mushrooms, salt, pepper, thyme, and mustard. Sauté about 5 minutes more and remove from heat.
3. Combine eggs, milk, and flour in a blender or food processor, and beat well.
4. Spread the grated cheese over the bottom of the unbaked crust, and spread the onion-mushroom mixture on top. Pour in the custard, and sprinkle top with paprika.
5. Bake for 35-45 minutes, or until firm in the center. Serve hot, warm, or at room temperature.
